name: David Sanchez
headline: Multimedia Engineer

experience.company: Centro de Innovación y Productividad del Litoral Pacífico | Fundacion Universidad del Valle
highlights: Led the conceptual design and planning of the island’s digital virtualization
Developed the project’s base environment, modeling realistic landscapes, materials, and lighting systems
Designed and implemented interactive systems using both Unity and Unreal Engine
Created responsive UI widgets and multilingual interfaces
Conducted technical migration from Unity to Unreal Engine

projects.name: ECHO-EMOTION (THESIS PROJECT)
outcomes: Designed and developed a VR experience using Unreal Engine
Implemented diegetic/non-diegetic sound systems and 3D spatial audio techniques
Conducted user testing with surveys and psychophysiological analysis

projects.name: Tactical Multiplayer Cover System
outcomes: Designed and implemented core multiplayer game mechanics
Utilized debugging tools to identify and resolve issues

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Multimedia Engineering
High School Diploma & Associate Degree in Electronics Technology

compact_resume_context: Multimedia Engineer with 1 year of experience. Skilled in C++, Unreal Engine, and Unity. Led the conceptual design and planning of a digital virtualization project. Developed a VR horror experience using Unreal Engine. Proficient in English (C1 level). Educated in Multimedia Engineering and Electronics Technology.
